acceptance.baseline: Bootstrap LB, timing-p90, A-relative negFP, owner-41 refusal, and exact 1000-step enforcement were absent/incomplete.
acceptance.after: All 10 criteria enforced; reviewer +2-negFP/1-step counterexample returns FAIL.
acceptance.target: Median B-A >=0.10; bootstrap LB >0; all seeds non-negative; B>C; class regression <=0.03; B negFP <=2/22 and <=A+1; timing non-worse; rate 0.3-1.0/s; equal 1000 steps.

acceptance.baseline: A reused output could retain a stale finetune_manifest.json.
acceptance.after: Stale manifest is removed before work; interrupted regression leaves zero final/temp manifests; completion publishes atomically last.
acceptance.target: No stale completion manifest after interruption.

acceptance.baseline: Reviewer probe: B=64 loss-valid frames, C=63, parity passed.
acceptance.after: C selects an already-valid shuffle frame, leaves the vacated frame valid background, and the 64-vs-63 parity probe hard-fails.

acceptance.metric: 4. Mandatory SHA chain and complete runbook
acceptance.baseline: Audio/BALL media and PTS hashes were optional; runbook ended at pre-dispatch.
acceptance.after: Both dependency hashes are mandatory with canonical bindings; runbook covers owner-41 gating, atomic ledger claim, second-touch refusal, sole protected evaluation, and closeout.
acceptance.target: Media/PTS identity required at every agreement hop and protected-50 one-touch procedure fully specified.
